architecturalDecisions.choice: CLI pre-sync/post-sync wrapping phase dispatch — skills have zero GitHub awareness
Switch on (phase) + manifest state to determine GitHub operations — no diffing or sidecar files
Skills write content fields (design, features, statuses); CLI exclusively writes github.* fields
gh CLI via Bun.spawn in TypeScript — same commands as current markdown but typed and testable
In-memory lazy cache per session — file-based cache (.beastmode/state/github-project.cache.json) removed
Warn-and-continue with try/catch at Bun.spawn boundary — never block workflow on GitHub failure
